title: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (LYB) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (LYB) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Lag
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) witnesses increased global olefins and polyolefins margins driven by reduced ethane cost in the United States, lower energy costs and modestly improved global demand in Q1.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.50 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.80 per share. This compares to earnings of $4 per share a year ago.

title: 4 Chemical Stocks Poised to Outshine Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: While softer demand in certain end markets is likely to be a drag, Albemarle (ALB), DuPont (DD), Axalta (AXTA) and LyondellBasell (LYB) are likely to have benefited from cost and pricing actions in Q1.

title: LyondellBasell (LYB) to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: LyondellBasell (LYB) first-quarter results are likely to reflect soft demand due to a challenging operating environment and moderate feedstock and energy costs.

title: 10 Biggest Basic Materials Stocks With High Debt-to-Equity Ratios
text: The Basic Materials sector includes companies that deal in the discovery, development, and processing of raw materials.

title: LyondellBasell: 4.9% Dividend Yield - Material Sector Dividend Payer Standout
text: Earnings per share yield continue to be attractive at 11.86% when 7% or lower is satisfactory. The current P/E of 8.43x earnings is somewhat lower than the normal 5-year of 8.66x to make it near fair value, which will be discussed and a purchase recommendation made.

title: LyondellBasell to Discuss First Quarter Results on Friday, April 28, 2023
text: HOUSTON and LONDON , April 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB), a leader in the global chemistry industry, will announce its first-quarter 2023 financial results before the U.S. market opens on Friday, April 28, followed by a webcast and teleconference to discuss the results at 11:00 a.m. EDT.

title: LyondellBasell Industries: Unlikely To See A Massive Special Dividend This Year
text: LyondellBasell Industries faced headwinds during late 2022, as Europe endured a natural gas shortage. As a result, their underlying operating cash flow excluding their working capital draw was their weakest result in recent history.

title: DivHut Portfolio Update: March 2023
text: The system is clearly broken, and has been for a while; however, I could find comfort in one thing, my dividends. Four figures in a month is a win in my book. Earning $1,893.81 represents 12.6% year over year increase in passive income.

title: The 7 Most Promising Battery Stocks to Buy in April
text: Following the surge in oil prices as the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) and non-member oil-producing nations – an alliance known as OPEC+ – the narrative for the most promising battery stocks to buy in April got even more enticing. With rising fuel prices affecting practically everybody, greater interest will focus on advanced energy solutions.

title: 7 Reliable Dividend Stocks With Low-Payout Ratios
text: While it's always good to have decent exposure to investments yielding passive income, you also want to consider reliable dividend stocks with low-payout ratios. By that, I'm referring to enterprises that pay their dividends via a relatively small pool of their earnings.
